response.justification: Bogdan is a strong candidate with significant, relevant experience in the geospatial domain, notably as the founder of GISCollective. His background in building low-latency, high-throughput systems at Dunnhumby is also a major asset. While his professional C++ experience is not recent, his extensive work with Dlang, a similar systems-level language, suggests he has the aptitude and foundational knowledge to quickly master modern C++. His seniority and demonstrated adaptability make him a compelling candidate worth interviewing to explore his fit and interest in returning to a C++-centric role.
strengths: Direct experience building and maintaining an open-source geospatial data platform (GISCollective).
Proven experience with high-performance, low-latency microservices handling massive request volumes.
Strong polyglot background with deep expertise in Dlang, a systems language, indicating a high capacity to learn and adapt to modern C++.
concerns: Professional C++ experience is not recent, with the last relevant role ending in 2015.
Primary focus in recent years has been on web technologies like TypeScript and Node.js, not systems programming.
No explicit experience mentioned with routing algorithms or tile optimization, which are core to the role.
